items.rationale: Sees deep interplay between crypto and AI/ML as a frontier; repeatedly champions permissionless/decentralized AI training and compute, and stacked his most recent CSX cohort with AI-crypto startups (inference markets, personal AI, verifiable compute).
items.age_note: First flagged 2023-04-05 ('early innings'), but persistently reinforced through 2024 (Gensyn, CSX Fall 2024 AI-heavy cohort) — current and rising.

citations.quote: We're in the early innings of some fascinating interplay between crypto+AI/ML
They're building on every level of the crypto stack, including AI, DeFi, infrastructure, and consumer applications such as photo sharing and mapping.
co-founders of @GensynAI blew our minds with their vision of the future of distributed AI/ML

items.rationale: Treats ZK/SNARK performance breakthroughs as major milestones, repeatedly amplifying them and signaling their significance to non-experts; recurring theme across the whole window.
items.age_note: Recurring 2023-08 through 2024-04 (Lasso/Jolt, CSX cryptography weeks) — sustained, current.

citations.quote: Get ready for some mind blowing improvements in SNARK performance with the release of Lasso & Jolt.
Translation for folks who aren't fluent in the world of ZK- this is a big, big deal.

items.rationale: Views the steady cadence of L2 fee reduction and throughput gains (Optimism, zkSync, Arbitrum, EIP-4844) as a key platform accelerant analogous to prior internet platform shifts.

citations.quote: Continued drumbeat of L2 progress in terms of reducing Ethereum transaction fees and increasing throughput

items.rationale: Singles out emerging AltDA and restaking capabilities as a near-horizon advancement; calls EigenLayer's vision 'truly next level' and joined to work with them.

citations.quote: Increasingly robust AltDA capabilites on the horizon- @eigencloud, @CelestiaOrg
What @eigencloud and @sreeramkannan are building and envisioning is truly next level. Beyond excited to have the opportunity to work together.

items.rationale: Highlights reduced new-user onboarding friction via embedded wallets as a critical enabler that historically accelerates developer experimentation in new ecosystems.

citations.quote: Reduced new user onboarding friction through embedded wallets- @privy, @dynamic_xyz

items.rationale: Personally enthusiastic about onchain games and consumer experiences (Pirate Nation/Proof of Play, Farcaster Frames as 'super simple and fun' app development), seeing simple/fun apps as a growth driver.
items.age_note: Pirate Nation 2023-09, Farcaster Frames 2024-02 — sustained interest, current.

citations.quote: Super simple (and fun!) app development- @farcaster_xyz Frames
Playing @PirateNationNFT over the last few months has been a delight.

items.rationale: Cites Farcaster's surprising traction and growth over 12 months as evidence of onchain social momentum he didn't expect to materialize so fast.

citations.quote: it would have been almost impossible to predict the traction & growth of @farcaster during the intervening 12 months

items.rationale: Treats navigating US/UK crypto regulation as a real challenge founders must actively manage, devoting CSX sessions to it — though his framing is constructive (UK as potential regulatory leader) rather than alarmed.
items.age_note: Recurring 2023-09 through 2024-07; tone is challenge-to-navigate, not existential threat — mild concern, current.

citations.quote: @BrianQuintenz and @MicheleKorver join us to unpack and decode the crypto policy & regulatory landscape across the US & UK.
we believe the UK is on a path to becoming a leader in crypto regulation.

risk_regime.rationale: Consistently structurally bullish builder-optimist: frames crypto as in 'early innings' analogous to the early internet, energized by core primitives 'snapping into focus,' and pours his energy into accelerating founders. No bearish or risk-off signals anywhere in the corpus; his posture is conviction in long-term crypto building rather than tactical market timing.

notes: Rosenthal is an operating partner (CSX/Crypto Startup School lead), not an investor publishing price calls — so the corpus is dominated by founder/company-building advice (1-1s, hiring, pricing, scaling, board management) that is NOT market view. Tokens_excited/concerned are deliberately empty: he names many networks/projects (Ethereum, Optimism, Uniswap, Solana, LayerZero, Filecoin, EigenLayer, Celestia, Worldcoin) but only as ecosystems/teams to admire or work with, never as token-price or investment theses, so no grounded token-level view exists. Sector views are extracted chiefly from his 2024-02-09 'crypto primitives snapping into focus' thread (the single richest market-view artifact) and the 2024-09-09 CSX Fall cohort announcement (most recent signal, AI-heavy). His overall stance is uniformly optimistic; the lone identifiable concern (regulation) is framed as a navigable challenge, not a bearish thesis. No material stance reversals detected across the 18-month window.
